shlokas.text:
केन्द्रायाष्टद्विनवस्वर्कः स्वादार्किभौमतश्च शुभः ।
षट्सप्तान्त्येषु सितात् षडायधीधर्मगो जीवात्
shlokas.english_meaning: The Sun is auspicious in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses from himself, Saturn, and Mars. From Venus, he is auspicious in the 6th, 7th, and 12th houses. From Jupiter, he is auspicious in the 5th, 6th, 9th, and 11th houses.
shlokas.hindi_meaning: सूर्य अपने आप से, शनि से और मंगल से १, २, ४, ७, ८, ९, १० और ११वें भावों में शुभ होता है। शुक्र से ६, ७ और १२वें भावों में तथा बृहस्पति से ५, ६, ९ और ११वें भावों में शुभ होता है।

shlokas.english_meaning: From the Moon, the Sun is auspicious in the Upachaya houses (3rd, 6th, 10th, and 11th). From Mercury, he is auspicious in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Ascendant (Lagna), he is auspicious in the 3rd, 4th, 6th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
शश्युपचयेषु लग्नात्साद्यमुनिः स्वात्कुजात्वनवधीषु ।
सूर्यत् साष्टस्मरगस्त्रिषडायसुतेषु सूर्यसुतात्
shlokas.english_meaning: The Moon is auspicious in the Upachaya houses (3rd, 6th, 10th, 11th) from the Ascendant. From himself, he is auspicious in the 1st, 3rd, 6th, 7th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Mars, in the 2nd, 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Sun, in the 3rd, 6th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Saturn, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 11th houses.

From Mercury, the Moon is auspicious in the 1st, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Jupiter, in the 1st, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Venus, in the 3rd, 4th, 5th, 7th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses.

Mars is auspicious in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses from himself. From Mercury, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 11th houses. From Jupiter, in the 6th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Sun, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
उदयादुपचयतनुषु त्रिषडायेष्विन्दुतः समो दशमः ।
भृगुतोन्त्यषडष्टायेष्वसितात् केन्द्रायनववसुषु
shlokas.english_meaning: From the Ascendant, Mars is auspicious in the 1st, 3rd, 6th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Moon, in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th houses. From Venus, in the 6th, 8th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Saturn, in the 1st, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
सौम्योऽन्त्यषण्णवायात्मजेष्विनात् स्वात् त्रितनुदशयुतेषु ।
चन्द्राद्द्विरिपुदशायाष्टसुखगतः स्वात् सादिषु विलग्नात्
shlokas.english_meaning: Mercury is auspicious in the 5th, 6th, 9th, 11th, and 12th houses from the Sun. From himself, in the 1st, 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Moon, in the 2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Ascendant, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
प्रथमसुखायद्विनिधनधर्मेषु सितात् त्रिधीसमेतेषु ।
साशास्मरेषु सौरारयोर्व्ययायरिपुवसुषु गुरोः
shlokas.english_meaning: From Venus, Mercury is auspicious in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, and 11th houses. From Saturn and Mars, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Jupiter, in the 6th, 8th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
जीवो भौमाद् द्वयायाष्टकेन्द्रगोऽर्कात् सधर्मसहजेषु ।
स्वात् सत्रिकेषु शुक्रान्नवदशलाभस्वधीरिपुषु
shlokas.english_meaning: Jupiter is auspicious in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses from Mars. From the Sun, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From himself, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Venus, in the 2nd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
शशिनः स्वरत्रिकोणार्थलाभगस्त्रिरिपुधीव्ययेषु यमात् ।
नवदिक्सुखाध्यधीस्वायशत्रुषु ज्ञात् सकामगो लग्नात्
shlokas.english_meaning: From the Moon, Jupiter is auspicious in the 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, and 11th houses. From Saturn, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 12th houses. From Mercury, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Ascendant, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th, 7th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
शुक्रो लग्नादासुतनवाष्टलाभेषु सव्ययश्चन्द्रात् ।
स्वात् सदिगसितात् त्रिसुखात्मजाष्टदिग्धर्मलाभेषु
shlokas.english_meaning: Venus is auspicious in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, 11th, and 12th houses from the Ascendant. From the Moon, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, 11th, and 12th houses. From himself, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Saturn, in the 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses.

From the Sun, Venus is auspicious in the 8th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Jupiter, in the 5th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Mercury, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, and 11th houses. From Mars, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 11th, and 12th houses.

Saturn is auspicious in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 11th houses from himself. From Mars, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Sun, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Venus, in the 6th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
त्रिषडायगः शशाङ्कादुदयात् ससुखाद्यकर्मगोऽथ गुरोः ।
सुतषट्व्ययायगो ज्ञात् व्ययायरिपुदिङ्नवाष्टस्थः
shlokas.english_meaning: From the Moon, Saturn is auspicious in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th houses. From the Ascendant, in the 1st, 3rd, 4th, 6th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Jupiter, in the 5th, 6th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Mercury, in the 6th, 8th, 9th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
स्थानेष्वेतेषु शुभाः शेषेष्वहिता भवन्ति चाष्टानाम् ।
अशुभशुभविशेषफलं ग्रहाः प्रयच्छन्ति चारगताः
shlokas.english_meaning: In these specified positions, the planets are auspicious; in other positions, they are inauspicious. Planets produce their special beneficial or malefic results according to their transit through these positions.
shlokas.hindi_meaning: इन बताए गए स्थानों में ग्रह शुभ होते हैं; शेष स्थानों में वे अशुभ होते हैं। ग्रह गोचर में इन स्थानों के अनुसार अपना विशेष शुभ या अशुभ फल प्रदान करते हैं।
